query_normalized: multi-lcb: extending livecodebench to multiple programming languages computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on "clone detection" and "clone-and-own" practices in industrial PLC programming (IEC 61131-3), which is a distinct domain and mechanism from the user's question about extending a specific benchmark (LiveCodeBench) to support multiple general-purpose programming languages for evaluation.
